name: Executive Program in Product Management
feeNote: Fees are +GST; upfront payment (inclusive of GST) is ₹83,500 vs two instalments totalling ₹83,500 (also inclusive of GST); application fee of ₹499 is separate and non-refundable.

curriculum: Week 1: Foundations — PM role, vocabulary, customer-centricity, outcomes vs outputs
Week 2–3: Discovery — user interviews, personas, Jobs-to-be-Done, opportunity solution frameworks
Week 4–5: Strategy — product vision, differentiation, value proposition, RICE/ICE/MoSCoW prioritisation, roadmaps
Week 6: Industry Mentor Sessions — Figma workshop, Indian app product breakdown, capstone group formation
Week 7–9: Build & Execute — PRD with user stories and acceptance criteria, sprint planning, backlog management, AI-assisted PRD drafting
Week 10–11: Measure — North Star metric, KPIs, counter-metrics, funnel/activation/retention analysis, A/B experimentation
Week 12: Industry Mentor Sessions — GenAI-PRD workshop, metrics-driven product breakdown, capstone progress reviews
Week 13: Final Exam — 3-hour case-based offline exam covering discovery, strategy, execution, and metrics
Week 14: Capstone Day — group capstone presentation defended live to IIM Ranchi faculty and industry practitioners
outcomes: Certification of Completion from IIM Ranchi
Project Completion Letter from Masai School
In-person capstone project defended before IIM Ranchi faculty and industry practitioners
Multiple career readiness support sessions
Access to IIM Ranchi campus community and peer network
eligibility: Open to aspiring product managers, sales/operations/support professionals, engineers, designers, analysts, final-year students, and freshers; no prior experience required.
usps: Offline, in-person weekend classes at IIM Ranchi Hyderabad Campus (6 hrs Saturday or Sunday)
60 hrs of IIM Ranchi faculty-led sessions + 12 hrs of industry mentor masterclasses (72 hrs total)
Faculty includes Prof. Tamal Samanta (PhD IIM Lucknow) and Dr. Shipra Mathur (PhD IIT Roorkee)
